nodes.label: Researcher
nodes.meta: Researches trending company websites and produces style guide markdown for Planner.

rules.title: Research trending company websites
rules.text: Search current, relevant company websites and identify visual, content, layout, interaction, and branding patterns that should inform the requested work.

rules.title: Create planner style guide
rules.text: Produce a concise markdown style guide for Planner that summarizes findings into practical design direction, including typography, color, layout, components, imagery, tone, and implementation constraints.

nodes.label: Site Auditor
nodes.meta: Uses BrowserOS to audit site functions, features, design, style, responsive behavior, and accessibility before Planner creates tasks.

rules.title: Use BrowserOS
rules.text: Inspect the target site with BrowserOS: navigate pages, snapshot structure, exercise safe controls and feature flows, capture screenshots for visual evidence, and verify results after each interaction.

rules.title: Create planner handoff
rules.text: Write a markdown audit handoff for Planner with coverage, functional findings, design and style feedback, responsive and accessibility notes, evidence, and planner-ready task candidates.

nodes.label: Planner
nodes.meta: Turns requirements, researcher style guidance, and site audit handoffs into todo cards.

rules.title: Use researcher style guide
rules.text: When a researcher handoff is present, incorporate the style guide markdown into the task breakdown and acceptance criteria for design-sensitive work.

rules.title: Use site audit handoff
rules.text: When a Site Auditor handoff is present, convert actionable functional, feature, design, style, responsive, and accessibility findings into small task-board tickets with clear acceptance criteria and inspection targets.

nodes.label: Worker
nodes.meta: Claims todo work, implements it, and requests review.

nodes.label: Reviewer
nodes.meta: Claims review work, validates it, and decides outcome.

outputs.label: Done
outputs.description: Accepted work and failed reviewed attempts that the owner can read and archive.

rules.title: Research handoff
rules.text: Researcher hands Planner a markdown style guide based on current trending company website research before planning design-sensitive implementation work.

outputs.label: Style Guide
outputs.description: Markdown style guide distilled from trending company website research for Planner to use when creating implementation tickets.

rules.title: Site audit handoff
rules.text: Site Auditor hands Planner a markdown audit report based on BrowserOS inspection before Planner scopes site quality, UX, or feature-fix tickets.

outputs.label: Site Audit
outputs.description: Markdown audit report covering site functions, features, design, style, responsive behavior, accessibility notes, evidence, and planner-ready task candidates.

outputs.label: To Do
outputs.description: Planner-created tickets ready for Workers to claim.

outputs.label: Review
outputs.description: Worker-completed tickets waiting for reviewer inspection.

globalRules.title: Source of truth
globalRules.text: Workflow map outputs describe agent coordination and drive viewer rendering for task-board lanes and handoff-file sections. Task movement still happens through board.json and the task-board API.

globalRules.title: Research before planning
globalRules.text: For website or brand-sensitive work, the Researcher should create a style guide markdown handoff before Planner creates todo tickets.

globalRules.title: Site audit before planning
globalRules.text: For existing site quality, UX, feature, or style work, the Site Auditor should create a BrowserOS-backed markdown handoff before Planner creates todo tickets.
